channel.title: Arrow Season Alerts
channel.description: New season notifications for Arrow from TVmaze metadata.

item.title: Season 8 — Premieres 2019-10-15
item.description: Premiere: 2019-10-15 | Finale: 2020-01-28 | Episodes: 10 | Network: The CW
